Title: Traction Apps

URL Source: https://tracxn.com/d/companies/traction-apps/__K69Hd9rsycrY6J7pfBrsyEuMCFjrVvNBWYugNK9ra5M

Published Time: 2021-08-17T12:37:04.000Z

Markdown Content:
Traction Apps is an acquired company based in Lagos (Nigeria), founded in 2018

by

[Dolapo Adejuyigbe](https://tracxn.com/d/people/dolapo-adejuyigbe/__fGKsXsIcUL-UqeuiP61PN0pYVI-S36cCgWR2GtAHwjk) and [Mayowa Alli](https://platform.tracxn.com/a/d/people/6077bb63b2828008e08534ad/mayowaalli).

It operates as a Provider of e-commerce solutions for businesses

.

Traction Apps has raised $6M in funding

from

[Ventures Platform](https://tracxn.com/d/venture-capital/venturesplatform/__CrNUH00FJbtV1ZvulJkp1gWbgrBxXyB880HgP0eGUdc).

The company has 1990 active competitors, including 200 funded and 161 that have exited

. Its top competitor

s

include companies like [Shopify](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/shopify/__NNWgXlWtRBr7FVe-BI1BiwMHs246IPF8HlqlcE5kZno), [ShopUp](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/shopup/___qBxZ5XnRfgeh2CLPNeO9Oh5GE7LL8t8nLKoGrwVng0) and [Pattern Com](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/patterncom/__eHEH4va0YuCHmcKYVb8NYyIs6R7aAVyAMaTG__3_QYw).

### Company Details

Provider of e-commerce solutions for businesses. Its solution offerings include payments management, inventory management, customer management, online storefront design, development, analytics, reporting, back-office business operations, invoicing, and more. Its mobile application is available on Android and iOS platforms. The company also offers retail solutions for offline businesses.

Website[tractionapps.co](https://tractionapps.co/)

Exit Details

Traction Apps

got acquired

by [OmniRetail](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/omniretail/__u-BZ6QN0VSLN4Wnjoy7HW8KaaSpNsA6Id8j8diN0Rx8) on

Oct 21, 2024

.

Are you a Founder ?

Traction Apps was founded in 2018 and raised its 1st [funding round](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/traction-apps/__K69Hd9rsycrY6J7pfBrsyEuMCFjrVvNBWYugNK9ra5M#funding-and-investors) 5 years after it was founded.

Traction Apps

is headquartered in

Lagos,

[Nigeria](https://tracxn.com/d/geographies/nigeria/__aRcH8lYOC74CSa9mr7vgyDsrJwlraqmlU3-gQ9qUxb0).

Traction Apps

got acquired

by [OmniRetail](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/omniretail/__u-BZ6QN0VSLN4Wnjoy7HW8KaaSpNsA6Id8j8diN0Rx8#investments-and-acquisitions) on Oct 21, 2024

.

Traction Apps'

latest funding was a

[$ *****](https://platform.tracxn.com/a/d/company/5c75fbef9adc10590aeb1d92#a:funding-and-investors)
Seed

round

on Aug 01, 2023

, with participation from

2

[investor s](https://platform.tracxn.com/a/d/company/5c75fbef9adc10590aeb1d92#a:funding-and-investors)
.

Provider of e-commerce solutions for businesses. Its solution offerings include payments management, inventory management, customer management, online storefront design, development, analytics, reporting, back-office business operations, invoicing, and more. Its mobile application is available on Android and iOS platforms. The company also offers retail solutions for offline businesses.

Traction Apps

is a funded company,

having raised

a total of

[$ *****](https://platform.tracxn.com/a/d/company/5c75fbef9adc10590aeb1d92#a:funding-and-investors)
in its 1st and only funding round

, a Seed round

on Aug 01, 2023

.
